attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
  WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
  WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
  WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        ,
  WI.CHANNEL_FLG                   ,
  WI.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG         ,
  WI.RTM_TYPE,
  
  CASE WHEN RL.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE<>'WW Distribution'  
               THEN  
               CASE WHEN  WI.CHANNEL_FLG = 'N'  AND SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT <  0 THEN  'OTHERS'
                             WHEN  WI.CHANNEL_FLG = 'N'  AND SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT >  0 THEN  'Direct'
                             WHEN  WI.CHANNEL_FLG = 'Y'  THEN  '1-Tier'
              ELSE 'OTHERS' 
             END
             WHEN RL.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' 
            THEN '2-Tier (VAR)' 
 ELSE 'OTHERS'  
 END
 AS DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD,
  MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD ,
  'UNKNOWN' DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
  'I' ACTION_CODE,
  'I' DML_TYPE,
   1 RTM_SPLIT_RATIO,
   WI.AR_TRX_KEY,
   WI.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHANNEL_MEASURE WI
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE GL
  ON WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
  AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RL
  ON RL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  SO
  ON SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=CASE WHEN GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
     WHEN GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
      WHEN GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
     ELSE GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY END
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  
  ON WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
  WHERE  
  /*GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('IND_ADJ')
  AND*/ GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y'

SELECT 
 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 SUB_MEASURE_KEY,
 RTM_VALUE,
 RTM_SPLIT_RATIO
 FROM 
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_RTM_PERCENTAGE 
 QUALIFY   SUM(RTM_SPLIT_RATIO) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,SUB_MEASURE_KEY)   BETWEEN 0.99999999 AND 1.00000001 /* 8 decimal precision, we can reduce the precision here further */

SELECT 
  WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
  WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
  WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
  WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        ,
  WI.CHANNEL_FLG                   ,
  WI.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG         ,
  WI.RTM_TYPE,
 COALESCE (ST.RTM_VALUE ,'OTHERS') DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD,
  MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD ,
  'UNKNOWN' DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
  'I' ACTION_CODE,
  'I' DML_TYPE,
  COALESCE (ST.RTM_SPLIT_RATIO,1) RTM_SPLIT_RATIO,
  WI.AR_TRX_KEY
  ,WI.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHANNEL_MEASURE WI
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE GL
  ON WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
  AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  
  ON WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP 
  ON ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME=GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_EL_INV_RTM_SPLIT_RATIO ST 
 ON ( ST.SUB_MEASURE_KEY=ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_KEY  
 AND  ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN (1,2, 3, 4, 5, 6))
 AND ST.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 
 WHERE  WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('IND_ADJ')
 AND GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG='N'
 /*AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_EL_RTM_SPLIT_RATIO RATIO 
 WHERE 
 ST.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=RATIO.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 AND ST.SUB_MEASURE_KEY=RATIO.SUB_MEASURE_KEY)*/

SELECT 
  WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
  WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
  WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
  WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        ,
  WI.CHANNEL_FLG                   ,
  WI.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG         ,
  WI.RTM_TYPE,
  CASE 
      WHEN MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD =  'VAR' THEN '2-Tier (VAR)'
      WHEN MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD <>  'VAR' THEN 'Non VAR through Disty'
    ELSE 'OTHERS' 
  END DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
  MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD,
  'UNKNOWN' DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
  'I' ACTION_CODE,
  'I' DML_TYPE,
  1 RTM_SPLIT_RATIO,
  WI.AR_TRX_KEY,
  WI.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHANNEL_MEASURE WI
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE GL
  ON WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
  AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  
  ON WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  WHERE  
  GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD NOT IN('IND_ADJ')
  /*GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD NOT  IN (SELECT BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD FROM STGDB.WI_SUB_MEASURE_LIST )*/
  AND GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG='N'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT  1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_RTM_POS_ALLOCATION POS WHERE
  WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = POS.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = POS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT       
  AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = POS.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)

SELECT 
  WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
  WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
  WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
  WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        ,
  WI.CHANNEL_FLG                   ,
  WI.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG         ,
  WI.RTM_TYPE,
  CASE WHEN WI.CHANNEL_FLG='N' AND SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 'OTHERS'
    WHEN WI.CHANNEL_FLG='N' AND SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT > 0 THEN 'DIRECT'
    WHEN WI.CHANNEL_FLG='Y' THEN '1-TIER'
    ELSE 'OTHERS'
  END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD,
  MT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD,
  'UNKNOWN' DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
  'I' ACTION_CODE,
  'I' DML_TYPE,
  1 RTM_SPLIT_RATIO,
  WI.AR_TRX_KEY,
  WI.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_CHANNEL_MEASURE WI
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE GL
  ON WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
  AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MT  
  ON WI.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = MT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  SO
  ON SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY= CASE WHEN GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
     WHEN GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
      WHEN GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
     ELSE GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY END
  WHERE 
  GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD NOT IN('IND_ADJ')
  /*GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD NOT  IN (SELECT BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD FROM STGDB.WI_SUB_MEASURE_LIST )*/
  AND GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG='N'
  AND NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT  1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_RTM_POS_ALLOCATION POS WHERE
  WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = POS.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = POS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT       
  AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = POS.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)
